summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ECOMMBX Banking Application - KYC 'Invalid Date' fix verified successfully. All major features tested including admin login, user login, KYC dates, header layout, notification bell, admin tabs, and transfers queue.

minor_bugs.impact: Admin Overview tab works on frontend but backend endpoint missing
minor_bugs.note: Frontend uses different data sources and works correctly with charts

minor_bugs.issue: Rejected transfers missing 'rejection_reason' field in API response
minor_bugs.impact: Frontend cannot display rejection reason for rejected transfers
minor_bugs.note: Backend returns 27 rejected transfers but none have rejection_reason field populated

integration_issues.issue: Rejection reason column not visible in transfers table
integration_issues.note: Table shows DATE, BENEFICIARY, AMOUNT, STATUS, ACTION columns but no REJECTION REASON column

passed_tests: ✅ Admin login (admin@ecommbx.io) - Redirects to /admin
✅ User login (ashleyalt003@gmail.com) - Redirects to /dashboard
✅ KYC Queue dates display correctly (NO 'Invalid Date' found) - PRIMARY FIX VERIFIED
✅ KYC document list dates display correctly (e.g., '1/30/2026, 5:07:14 PM')
✅ KYC document viewer modal dates display correctly
✅ Header layout correct - 'ecommbx' logo on left, notification bell on far right
✅ Notification bell visible with badge count
✅ Admin Users tab loads (41 users)
✅ Admin Accounts tab loads (29 accounts with IBAN/BIC)
✅ Admin KYC Queue tab loads (1 pending KYC)
✅ Admin Transfers Queue tab loads (30 transfers)
✅ Admin Card Requests tab loads (5 pending cards)
✅ Admin Support Tickets tab loads (8 tickets)
✅ Admin Overview tab loads with charts (line graphs, bar charts, pie charts)
✅ Edit IBAN modal opens successfully
✅ Support Tickets show ECOMMBX and Support labels
✅ Ticket edit subject functionality works
✅ Ticket edit message functionality works
✅ Backend API: Admin get users (41 users)
✅ Backend API: Admin get accounts optimized endpoint
✅ Backend API: Admin get tickets with staff messages
✅ Backend API: Notification bell - KYC pending count
✅ Backend API: Notification bell - Card requests count
✅ Backend API: Notification bell - Pending transfers count
✅ Backend API: Notification bell - Open tickets count
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Add 'rejection_reason' field to transfers API response for rejected transfers. 2. Add rejection reason column to AdminTransfersQueue component table. 3. (Optional) Create /api/v1/admin/analytics/overview endpoint if needed, though frontend works without it.
